images.caption: Figure 1:AlloSpatial inference and training pipeline.A, At inference time, AlloSpatial takes egocentric videos or multi-view observations and follows a three-stage Spatial Reasoning Harness to invoke World2Mind, acquire allocentric spatial knowledge, and arbitrate evidence before answering.B, To internalize this harness, we distill and filter high-quality harness-following trajectories from proprietary models for supervised cold start, and further optimize the policy with live World2Mind interaction and a Harness-Gated Trajectory Reward.

header: 2Related Work: Spatial Reasoning in Foundation Models
